expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md states Phase 4a artifacts are missing and therefore scenario drafting coverage cannot be verified: "we cannot verify that the orchestrator ... produced a compliant blind scenario draft that covers the required focus areas." It only infers intended areas from fixture context, not an actual scenario draft covering them.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly note lack of Phase 4a runtime outputs (e.g., "no phase4a_spawn_manifest.json" and "no drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r<round>.md"), concluding "Not Demonstrated (insufficient evidence)." The output is an assessment of missing evidence, not Phase 4a-aligned drafted content.
